key_passages.label: why_now
key_passages.text: Why this report? Schaeffler has been one of the most vocal automotive companies regarding the diversification of its growth drivers. New growth areas such as humanoid robotics, drones and autonomous systems, defence applications, and space have become increasingly important elements of the equity story. key_passages.text: Valuation and investment conclusion Γû¬The underlying equity story is centred on unlocking self-help potential through further improvements in operational excellence.
